name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State definitions *)
THINKING == 0
HUNGRY == 1
EATING == 2

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..N]
  /\ states \in [1..N -> {THINKING, HUNGRY, EATING}]
  /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] \in 0..N
  /\ \A i \in 1..N : states[i] \in {THINKING, HUNGRY, EATING}

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> THINKING]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ states[i] = THINKING
    /\ forks[i] = 0
    /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0
    /\ forks[i] = i
    /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = LEFT(i)
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = EATING]
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![LEFT(i)] = 0]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ states[i] = EATING
    /\ forks[i] = 0
    /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = THINKING]
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![LEFT(i)] = LEFT(i)]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ states[i] = HUNGRY
    /\ forks[i] = 0
    /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = EATING]
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![LEFT(i)] = LEFT(i)]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ states[i] = EATING
    /\ forks[i] = i
    /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = LEFT(i)
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = THINKING]
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![LEFT(i)] = 0]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ states[i] = THINKING
    /\ forks[i] = 0
    /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = HUNGRY]
    /\ forks' = forks

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ Len(q) = 0
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1

Producer == /\ Len(q) < K
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = IF Len(q) = K-1 THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
           /\ q' = Append(q, 1)

Consumer == /\ Len(q) > 0
           /\ head' = IF Len(q) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = NULL
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Readers

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
        \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
          /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
          /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = \E j \in 1..N : j \in 1..N /\ j # i : (clocks[j] - clocks[i]) \div (N - 1)]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLE free, allocated, p

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \notin DOMAIN allocated
          /\ \E p \in free:
              /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = \E p' \in free: p']
              /\ free' = free \ {p}
        \/ \E c \in DOMAIN allocated:
          /\ \E p \in allocated[c]:
              /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = \E p' \in allocated[c]: p']
              /\ free' = free \cup {p}

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ allocated \subseteq [Client -> SUBSET Pages]
          /\ \A c \in DOMAIN allocated: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in DOMAIN allocated: \A p \in allocated[c]: p \in Pages
          /\ \A c1, c2 \in DOMAIN allocated: c1 # c2 => allocated[c1] # allocated[c2]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> 0]

Next == 
  \/ /\ turn = 0
      /\ wants[0] = 0
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 1]
      /\ turn' = 1
      /\ UNCHANGED <<wants[1]>>
  \/ /\ turn = 1
      /\ wants[1] = 0
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 1]
      /\ turn' = 0
      /\ UNCHANGED <<wants[0]>>
  \/ /\ turn = 0
      /\ wants[0] = 1
      /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, wants>>
  \/ /\ turn = 1
      /\ wants[1] = 1
      /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, wants>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES counts

(* --algorithm GCounter
actions
  Increment(n) == 
    /\ counts[n][n] = counts[n][n] + 1
  Merge(n, m) == 
    /\ counts[n] = [k \in Node |-> Max(counts[n][k], counts[m][k])]
  Total(n) == 
    /\ counts[n] = [k \in Node |-> Max(counts[][k])]
*)

TypeOK == 
  /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
  /\ \A n \in Node : counts[n] \in [Node -> Nat]

Init == 
  /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]

Next == 
  \E n \in Node : 
    /\ counts[n][n] = counts[n][n] + 1
  \/ \E n, m \in Node : n # m
    /\ counts[n] = [k \in Node |-> Max(counts[n][k], counts[m][k])]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
